# Add "Create Organization" button to Organization page

## Context

The Organization page (`/dashboard/organization`) only manages the currently active org. To create a new organization, users must find the option in the sidebar's org switcher dropdown. This adds a visible "Create Organization" button directly on the Organization page for discoverability.

## Approach

Add a `+ Create Organization` button to the `PageHeader` actions slot on `OrganizationPage.tsx`. The button links to the existing `/dashboard/organization/new` (CreateOrgPage) which already has the full create form.

This is the simplest approach and follows existing patterns — `PageHeader` already supports an `actions` prop, and `CreateOrgPage` already works.

## Changes

**`apps/web/src/pages/dashboard/OrganizationPage.tsx`**
- Import `Link` from `react-router-dom` and `Plus` from `lucide-react`
- Add a `<Button>` wrapped in a `<Link to="/dashboard/organization/new">` to the `PageHeader`'s `actions` prop

## Verification

1. Run `bun run verify` to check types/lint/tests
2. Start the app and navigate to `/dashboard/organization` — confirm the button appears in the header
3. Click the button — confirm it navigates to the create org form
